title: TGaceAllStories

items.title: ‘I’m not made of money’: My heating engineer didn’t fix my radiators on his first visit. Do I pay him a second time?
items.description: “He charged $180 for the second visit for his time, including $40 for the part.”

items.title: My husband, 73, wants to sell our $300K rental and buy an annuity. Is that wise?
items.description: “He believes the annuity will net $1,600 per month, the same as the rent from the house.”

items.title: Bad Bunny fails to produce stock market sizzle for two big European brands
